home.title: CaT | Camping Info Web Tool
home.hero_sub: Find, book and review campings from across the country. A centralized platform for nature lovers, with an interactive map, real reviews and simple bookings.
home.about_sub: Forget endless searches across dozens of sites. CaT gives you a centralized space to find, compare and book campings quickly, with real information from other campers.
home.f1_desc: Browse hundreds of locations with all the important details: facilities, price, capacity, rules and photos. Save your favorites in personal collections for quick access.
home.f2_desc: Visualize all campings on the map and filter by area, facilities or rating. Find exactly the right spot for your next nature escape.
home.f3_desc: Book directly from the platform and leave a review after your stay. Real opinions from other campers help you make the right choice every time.
home.reviews_sub: Don't take our word for it. Discover how students, families and adventurers use CaT to find perfect spots, plan getaways and share their experiences with the community.
home.r1_text: I found the perfect camping for a summer weekend through CaT. The facility filters helped enormously — I knew exactly what to expect when I arrived. Booking took two minutes.
home.r2_text: As a mother with two young kids, safety and facilities matter enormously. Reviews on CaT are real and detailed. I found a camping with a playground and hot showers exactly as I needed.
home.r3_text: The interactive map is amazing. I planned a one-week route through the Apuseni mountains and identified campings at each stage. I can't leave for nature anymore without CaT.
home.story_desc: We built CaT out of a common frustration: information about campings was scattered across dozens of sites, reviews were fake or outdated, and bookings were made by phone. We wanted a modern platform where the camping community could find, rate and book trusted locations. Our mission is simple: make nature more accessible for everyone.
home.contact_sub: Do you have a question about the platform, want to report a camping or give us feedback? Our team is always available.
home.contact_email_desc: Write to us for general questions or technical support
home.contact_phone_desc: Need urgent help with your account? Call us
home.sent_ok: Message sent! We will contact you soon.

admin.feedback_modal_desc: Your message will be visible to the user. Clearly explain what needs to be corrected before resubmitting.
admin.feedback_ph: E.g.: The provided documents are incomplete. Please attach a valid operating permit...
admin.ban_modal_desc: The user will be disconnected immediately and will no longer be able to access campings or leave reviews.
admin.ban_days_ph: E.g.: 30 — leave empty for permanent ban
admin.ban_reason_min: Reason must be at least 3 characters.
admin.export_desc: Download platform data in CSV (Excel) or JSON format.
admin.import_desc1: Upload a CSV or JSON file with new campings. Required fields: name, latitude, longitude.
